query: SELECT s3_cover_url, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id SEPARATOR ', ') as book_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(title SEPARATOR ' | ') as titles FROM book_profiles WHERE s3_cover_url IS NOT NULL AND s3_cover_url != '' GROUP BY s3_cover_url HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT s3_cover_url, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id SEPARATOR ', ') as book_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(title SEPARATOR ' | ') as titles FROM book_profiles WHERE s3_cover_url IS NOT NULL AND s3_cover_url != '' GROUP BY s3_cover_url HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC;
